view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a machine-readable tool/action catalog is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a machine-readable tool/action catalog is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a machine-readable tool/action catalog as outlined in the linked use case. The evidence indicates that the partner-built retention agent can discover its available capabilities, which include detailed request schemas and policy governance, thus confirming the existence of a machine-readable catalog. This is directly supported by the linked use case summary, which explicitly states the need for a machine-readable tool/action catalog and describes how the agent can access this information.
